Test_Objective: Verify the dropdown hashtag list opens when the user clicks the dropdown trigger
Precondition: User is on the page containing the hashtag filter dropdown; dropdown is closed
Steps:
1. Locate the hashtag filter dropdown trigger on the page
2. Click on the dropdown trigger
Expected_Result: Dropdown list opens and displays the list of 13 hashtag items

Test_Objective: Verify the dropdown closes when the user clicks outside the dropdown area
Steps:
1. Open the hashtag filter dropdown
2. Click on any area outside the dropdown
Expected_Result: Dropdown closes; no selection change occurs

Test_Objective: Verify the dropdown closes when the user presses the Escape key
Steps:
1. Open the hashtag filter dropdown
2. Press the Escape key on the keyboard
Expected_Result: Dropdown closes; no selection change occurs

Test_Objective: Verify the dropdown is closed by default when the page loads
Precondition: Page containing the hashtag filter has loaded
Steps:
1. Navigate to the page containing the hashtag filter
2. Observe the dropdown trigger area
Expected_Result: Dropdown list is not visible (closed state); only the trigger element is shown

Test_Objective: Verify the dropdown can be reopened after being closed
Precondition: Dropdown has been opened and then closed
Steps:
1. Open the dropdown
2. Close the dropdown (click outside)
3. Click the dropdown trigger again
Expected_Result: Dropdown reopens and displays the full list of hashtag items

Test_Objective: Verify the dropdown container displays with correct position and size and background and border
Steps:
1. Open the hashtag filter dropdown
2. Inspect the dropdown container visually
Expected_Result: Container has dark (near-black) background, rounded corners, subtle border, positioned correctly below the trigger

Test_Objective: Verify each hashtag item has correct dimensions and spacing
Steps:
1. Open the dropdown
2. Inspect individual tag items
Expected_Result: Each tag item is approximately 131x56px with consistent spacing between items

Test_Objective: Verify unselected hashtag items display with correct default styling
Precondition: Dropdown is open with at least one unselected item visible
Steps:
1. Open the dropdown
2. Observe unselected hashtag items
Expected_Result: Unselected items show white/bright bold text with '#' prefix on dark background, no glow effect

Test_Objective: Verify the selected hashtag item displays with glow/highlight effect
Precondition: Dropdown is open; one item is selected
Steps:
1. Open the dropdown
2. Select a hashtag item
3. Reopen the dropdown
4. Observe the selected item
Expected_Result: Selected item has dark background with glowing border/highlight effect and bright text, visually distinct from unselected items

Test_Objective: Verify hashtag items show hover effect when mouse hovers over them
Steps:
1. Open the dropdown
2. Hover the mouse over an unselected hashtag item
Expected_Result: Item displays a light background highlight to indicate interactivity

Test_Objective: Verify all 13 hashtag labels are displayed with correct text
Steps:
1. Open the dropdown
2. Scroll through the entire list
3. Verify each hashtag label
Expected_Result: All 13 hashtags display correctly: Toan dien, Gioi chuyen mon, Hieu suat cao, Truyen cam hung, Cong hien, Aim High, Be Agile, Wasshoi, Huong muc tieu, Huong khach hang, Chuan quy trinh, Giai phap sang tao, Quan ly xuat sac

Test_Objective: Verify all hashtag items are displayed with '#' prefix
Steps:
1. Open the dropdown
2. Check text format of each item
Expected_Result: Each hashtag label is prefixed with '#' character (e.g., '#Dedicated', '#Inspring')

Test_Objective: Verify font style and size and color are consistent across all hashtag items
Steps:
1. Open the dropdown
2. Compare font properties across all items
Expected_Result: All items use the same font family, size, weight (bold), and color (white/bright for default, bright for selected)

Test_Objective: Verify vertical scrollbar appears when list exceeds container height
Steps:
1. Open the dropdown
2. Check if all 13 items fit within the visible area
Expected_Result: If items exceed the container height, a vertical scrollbar appears and functions correctly (scroll up/down)

Test_Objective: Verify no horizontal scrollbar appears in the dropdown
Steps:
1. Open the dropdown
2. Check for horizontal scrollbar
Expected_Result: No horizontal scrollbar is displayed; all content fits within the container width

Test_Objective: Verify hashtag items appear in the correct order as specified
Steps:
1. Open the dropdown
2. Verify the order of items from top to bottom
Expected_Result: Items appear in the defined order matching the spec list (Toan dien first through Quan ly xuat sac last)

Test_Objective: Verify dropdown displays correctly on mobile viewport
Steps:
1. Set viewport to 320px width
2. Open the hashtag filter dropdown
3. Inspect layout, text, and item visibility
Expected_Result: Dropdown displays correctly; items are readable; touch targets are at least 44x44px; no content overflow

Test_Objective: Verify dropdown displays correctly on tablet viewport
Steps:
1. Set viewport to 768px width
2. Open the hashtag filter dropdown
3. Inspect layout
Expected_Result: Dropdown displays correctly with proper sizing and alignment for tablet

Test_Objective: Verify dropdown displays correctly on desktop viewport
Steps:
1. Set viewport to 1024px or wider
2. Open the hashtag filter dropdown
3. Inspect layout
Expected_Result: Dropdown displays correctly with proper sizing and alignment for desktop

Test_Objective: Verify the selected item is clearly distinguishable from unselected items
Precondition: Dropdown is open with one item selected
Steps:
1. Select a hashtag
2. Reopen the dropdown
3. Compare selected vs unselected items visually
Expected_Result: Selected item has clearly visible glow/highlight effect that makes it easily distinguishable from unselected items

Test_Objective: Verify clicking an unselected hashtag selects it and applies the filter
Precondition: Dropdown is open; no item is currently selected
Steps:
1. Open the dropdown
2. Click on '#Dedicated' hashtag item
Expected_Result: '#Dedicated' is selected (shown with glow effect); dropdown closes; page content is filtered by '#Dedicated'

Test_Objective: Verify clicking a selected hashtag deselects it
Precondition: A hashtag is currently selected; dropdown is open
Steps:
1. Open the dropdown
2. Click on the currently selected hashtag item
Expected_Result: Item is deselected; filter is removed; page shows unfiltered content

Test_Objective: Verify only one hashtag can be active at a time
Steps:
1. Open the dropdown
2. Click on '#Inspring' (a different hashtag)
Expected_Result: '#Inspring' becomes selected; '#Dedicated' is deselected; filter updates to '#Inspring'; dropdown closes

Test_Objective: Verify the first hashtag in the list can be selected
Precondition: Dropdown is open; scroll position is at top
Steps:
1. Open the dropdown
2. Click on the first item (Toan dien)
Expected_Result: First item is selected; dropdown closes; filter applied correctly

Test_Objective: Verify a middle hashtag in the list can be selected
Steps:
1. Open the dropdown
2. Scroll to middle of list if needed
3. Click on a middle item (e.g., 'Aim High')
Expected_Result: Middle item is selected; dropdown closes; filter applied correctly

Test_Objective: Verify the last hashtag in the list can be selected
Steps:
1. Open the dropdown
2. Scroll to the bottom of the list
3. Click on the last item (Quan ly xuat sac)
Expected_Result: Last item is selected; dropdown closes; filter applied correctly

Test_Objective: Verify the dropdown automatically closes after a hashtag is selected
Steps:
1. Open the dropdown
2. Click on any hashtag item
Expected_Result: Dropdown closes immediately after selection; selected filter is applied

Test_Objective: Verify the selected hashtag filter is applied to the entire page content
Precondition: Page has content associated with different hashtags
Steps:
1. Open the dropdown
2. Select '#Dedicated'
3. Observe page content
Expected_Result: Page displays only content tagged with '#Dedicated'; unrelated content is hidden or filtered out

Test_Objective: Verify removing the filter shows all unfiltered content
Precondition: A hashtag filter is currently active
Steps:
1. Open the dropdown
2. Click the currently selected hashtag to deselect
3. Observe page content
Expected_Result: Page returns to showing all content without any hashtag filter

Test_Objective: Verify changing the active filter updates page content correctly
Steps:
1. Open the dropdown
2. Select '#Inspring' (different hashtag)
3. Observe page content
Expected_Result: Page content updates to show only items tagged with '#Inspring'; previous '#Dedicated' filter is replaced

Test_Objective: Verify Up and Down arrow keys navigate through hashtag items
Steps:
1. Open the dropdown
2. Press the Down arrow key multiple times
3. Press the Up arrow key multiple times
Expected_Result: Each Down press highlights the next item; each Up press highlights the previous item; highlight wraps or stops at boundaries

Test_Objective: Verify pressing Enter selects the currently highlighted item
Precondition: Dropdown is open; an item is highlighted via keyboard navigation
Steps:
1. Open the dropdown
2. Use Down arrow to highlight a hashtag
3. Press Enter
Expected_Result: Highlighted hashtag is selected; dropdown closes; filter is applied to the page

Test_Objective: Verify pressing Escape closes the dropdown without changing selection
Precondition: Dropdown is open; a hashtag is highlighted but not yet selected
Steps:
1. Open the dropdown
2. Navigate with arrow keys to highlight an item
3. Press Escape
Expected_Result: Dropdown closes; no selection change; previous filter state remains unchanged

Test_Objective: Verify the dropdown list scrolls vertically when items exceed container height
Precondition: Dropdown is open; 13 items exceed visible area
Steps:
1. Open the dropdown
2. Scroll down using mouse wheel or trackpad
3. Scroll back up
Expected_Result: List scrolls smoothly; all 13 items are accessible via scrolling; scroll does not exceed list boundaries

Test_Objective: Verify clicking outside the dropdown closes it and preserves current state
Precondition: Dropdown is open; '#Dedicated' is currently selected
Steps:
1. Open the dropdown
2. Click on an area outside the dropdown
Expected_Result: Dropdown closes; '#Dedicated' remains the active filter; page content unchanged

Test_Objective: Verify dropdown handles rapid open/close interactions without errors
Steps: 1. Click the dropdown trigger rapidly (open-close-open-close) multiple times
Expected_Result: Dropdown opens and closes correctly each time without visual glitches, lag, or errors

Test_Objective: Verify every one of the 13 hashtags can be selected and applies a filter
Steps: 1. For each of the 13 hashtags: open dropdown, select hashtag, verify filter is applied, verify page content updates
Expected_Result: All 13 hashtags are selectable; each applies the correct filter; page content updates accordingly for each

Test_Objective: Verify the selected hashtag filter persists while the user interacts with filtered page content
Steps:
1. Select a hashtag filter
2. Interact with the filtered page content (scroll page, click items)
3. Reopen the dropdown
Expected_Result: Previously selected hashtag is still shown as selected in the dropdown

Test_Objective: Verify users cannot type text into the dropdown list
Steps:
1. Open the dropdown
2. Attempt to type characters on the keyboard
Expected_Result: No text input is accepted; dropdown does not have a text input field; typing has no effect on the list (except for keyboard navigation keys)
